# Moyduz

> LLM-readable site context for moyduz.com

## About

Moyduz is a software company and web design agency delivering custom e-commerce platforms, SaaS products, and AI automation tools. We serve businesses worldwide across 150+ countries.

## Key Pages

- / - Homepage
- /about - About Us
- /services - Services
- /compare - Karşılaştır (platform karşılaştırması)
- /alternatives - Alternatifler (Shopify, ikas, Webflow vb. alternatifleri)
- /careers - Careers
- /customers - Customers
- /marketplace/templates - Template marketplace
- /pricing - Pricing
- /blog - Blog
- /faq - FAQ
- /contact - Contact
- /privacy-policy - Privacy Policy
- /refund-policy - Refund Policy
- /terms-of-service - Terms of Service

## Products & Services

- High-performing e-commerce websites
- Custom web design and development
- SaaS platforms and cloud infrastructure
- AI-powered automation tools
- Digital marketing and analytics
- Template marketplace for blocks and designs

## Contact

For inquiries: /contact
